definitions.en: To produce tears as a result of emotion or pain.
definitions.es: Producir lágrimas como resultado de una emoción o dolor.
definitions.vi: Sản xuất nước mắt do cảm xúc hoặc đau đớn.

example.en: The baby is crying because it is hungry.
example.es: El bebé está llorando porque tiene hambre.
example.vi: Em bé đang khóc vì đói.

notes:
khóc = to cry, to shed tears because of emotion or pain. It’s the normal word for crying (sad, hurt, touched, etc.).

It’s an intransitive verb, so no object after it. You often add adverbs: khóc to (cry loudly), khóc thầm (cry silently), khóc nức nở (sob hard).

Very common opposite idea: cười (to laugh) — nice mental pair: khóc ↔ cười.
exampleSentences: Em bé bắt đầu khóc khi không thấy mẹ ở bên cạnh.
Anh đã từng khóc khi xem bộ phim buồn ấy.
Chị không muốn khóc trước mặt mọi người trong buổi tiệc sinh nhật.

translation.en: The boy will cry if he doesn't have toys.

content.sentence: Cậu bé sẽ ___ nếu không có đồ chơi.

exampleSentencesTranslated: The baby started to cry when he did not see his mother nearby.
I used to cry when I watched that sad movie.
She does not want to cry in front of everyone at the birthday party.
notes_md:
**khóc** = to cry, to shed tears because of emotion or pain. It’s the normal word for crying (sad, hurt, touched, etc.).

It’s an intransitive verb, so no object after it. You often add adverbs: *khóc to* (cry loudly), *khóc thầm* (cry silently), *khóc nức nở* (sob hard).


Very common opposite idea: **cười** (to laugh) — nice mental pair: *khóc ↔ cười*.

content.sentence: Cô ấy bắt đầu ___ khi nghe tin xấu.

translation.en: She started to cry when she heard the bad news.
